series_metadata.series_title: Contracts, Memorandums of Understanding (MOU) and Related Materials
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains memorandums of understanding (MOU), contracts, contract encumbrances, procurements, complaints to vendors, related MOU and contract documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: five (5) years MOU or contract expires ; Electronic: five (5) years MOU or contract expires
